leadershipSection.title: Senior motion ownership for SaaS, AI learning and product storytelling teams.
leadershipSection.description: I help teams translate complex briefs into clear motion systems, product explainers, learning modules and launch-ready video assets. The value is not just animation output; it is creative direction, production planning, team coordination, QA and stakeholder-ready delivery.

strengths.title: Motion Leadership
strengths.description: Led and coordinated a 10+ person creative team across design, animation, editing, audio and delivery tasks.

strengths.title: Product Storytelling
strengths.description: Turned product, learning and brand briefs into clear narratives, visual flows, storyboards and motion-ready execution plans.

strengths.title: Pipeline Ownership
strengths.description: Built repeatable workflows for Gen AI visuals, motion graphics, audio prep, SFX, final edit, QA and handoff.

strengths.title: Stakeholder Delivery
strengths.description: Managed feedback loops, quality checks, consistency standards and final exports so teams could ship reliably.

experiences.title: Sr. Motion Graphics Designer - Team Lead

experiences.title: Motion Graphics Lead - Head of Production
highlights: Led motion design for YouTube network with 2.6M+ subscribers

experiences.title: Associate Process Manager - AR Motion

caseStudy.label: Case Study
caseStudy.title: Motion Systems for Product, Learning and Brand Teams
caseStudy.description: Production-grade modules and motion assets led through brief, story, storyboard, Gen AI workflow, animation, SFX, QA and delivery.

hero.body: I help product, learning and brand teams turn complex ideas into clear motion systems, explainers and launch-ready video assets. 6+ years across motion leadership, 300+ videos and course assets produced, 10+ person creative teams led, and end-to-end ownership across story, storyboard, Gen AI workflows, animation, audio, SFX, QA and stakeholder-ready delivery.

clientsSection.title: Brand motion built for teams people already trust.
